entries.gt_032079d8811536: Show me your hands. Shaking, but you will live. I am Olga Dmitrievna, a doctor; eat first, then play hero.
entries.gt_0465876a338cb7: You came to me on Olga Dmitrievna's recommendation? She is a good colleague. If you are not afraid of field work, we will begin.
entries.gt_05a1561319993c: The Heralds are not for the cult. They hold the seal at the passage; while they are alive, you cannot go lower properly.
entries.gt_05b6c1b1c0841e: Cultists call it a sign. I call it a dirty sample with dangerously good repeatability.
entries.gt_05fdfcd2a2cc1c: Purple fog is not smoke. Smoke coughs; this one counts doors. Two doors are better than one.
entries.gt_089014abde5440: Drink water in advance. When your tongue is dry, there is nothing to swallow pills with.
entries.gt_098da11e308896: Help Vanka: he is frightened of Petlya the Shadow, and Vanka links Shadows to samosbor. Kill Petlya in a wide place; in tight quarters the shadow strikes first.
entries.gt_0a27d29959a212: Give the idol to Nikanor for inspection. He will return it with a rune and water; the voice will become clearer to the cult.
entries.gt_0bd4fb1fa5154b: This does not need courage, it needs legs, ammo, and a door that closes on the first try.
entries.gt_0c0d40b5d76737: The Underthreshold starts beyond the seal. Without a count of the Heralds, people go there only to get lost.
entries.gt_0c97540a466b93: Ivan Zakharov, my former student, failed the basic topology program and was expelled. In the corridors they now call him Vanka Banchiny.
entries.gt_0cccb71e8c1a3b: The Liquidators filed a field report on the idol and returned the evidence.
entries.gt_0ce806de695e71: The device lies, but it lies consistently. For a model that is almost a gift, if you do not stand nearby.
entries.gt_10006f195d91d1: Take the Shadow's remains to Yakov. Do not open the jar: Yakov needs the clot intact to test the connection between Shadows and samosbor.
entries.gt_11e1aaa8d9658c: Do not pick at a Betonnik with a knife. Keep your distance and a door behind you.
entries.gt_13d1634b1bebc3: The radiator whispered before the siren. First it whispers, then the door asks to be opened. Do not open it.
entries.gt_16efc18a7a9a91: Do not argue with a hermodoor, dear. If it closed, you sit and wait for the all-clear.
entries.gt_17703a6e7cf7ce: Three short knocks on the pipe means withdraw. Two long means they are carrying a wounded person. No songs.
entries.gt_193dd36130c47f: Samosbor howled - to the hermodoor. Not to a corner, not to rumors, to the hermodoor.
entries.gt_1acd713a365dd4: If Yakov sent another civilian with a jar, do not put the jar on the floor.
entries.gt_1ad3ef57d0ed64: Quiet. Do not call it hell. It is the lower wet workshop: the lift lies, the floor sticks, the Heralds hold the passage.
entries.gt_1ff7f10d8ddb00: Space or LMB means strike and shoot. Sergeant Barinov will give you a gun, and you do not wave it at people.
entries.gt_217852ff50a589: A PSI clot is a tool, not a trick. A tool has a cost, recoil, and a field for side effects.
entries.gt_21e90c7f726df6: Keep the Makarov dry. A wet barrel jams without warning.
entries.gt_236afabc88b268: The chemical protection locker was locked. Now it has one suit, two jars, and a record saying access was closed.
entries.gt_243c142cf6142c: Colleague, do not put the clot next to bread. Crumbs in the protocol later look like a new form of life.
entries.gt_24f377e9868230: When samosbor starts, drop the argument and go to the hermodoor.
entries.gt_261d592e9f5485: The medpost is open while I am standing. If I am gone, bandage on the left, do not touch the logbook.
entries.gt_287b8c2c04198d: Kill the Creator in the Void: the mysterious demiurge behind the samosbors. Data deleted; keep cover between the green salvos.
entries.gt_2974d317bdc67b: Not all parts of a person come back. I count only those who are standing.
entries.gt_2aa35d159cc974: No thanks needed. Just if the door asks for Vanka, say: not me.
entries.gt_2d637b1b94d971: If the voice has gone soft, cross it out first and close the door.
entries.gt_2f52ecc0e8ea83: A wounded person is not dragged prettily. Drag fast, along the dry edge, weapon forward.
entries.gt_301d1e610799cd: The protocol is simple: do not unseal the jar, keep it in a cool dry place, after contact fill in the experiment log. Are you still here?
entries.gt_30cde7316a54ca: An Assembly climbs fast. Do not stand straight on; move behind a corner.
entries.gt_31a19db3bfc99a: Targets on the wall - shoot as much as you want. Bullet marks are visible.
entries.gt_338aeb32236253: Yakov called me Ivan again? Let him pass topology himself when the walls changed places in the morning.
entries.gt_34fc1853fdf5ad: Report the shooting to Olga. She will issue bandages, water, and bread, then give the first real work on the floor.
entries.gt_356af4deee0a68: Vanka is now afraid of corners one at a time. That is better than all of them at once.
entries.gt_359934fdd42164: Quiet. Someone is rummaging through jars by the neighboring storeroom. If it clinks three times, Vanka is not with you.
entries.gt_366b8642d3d7da: Bring the Marked One a sheet with a forged stamp. He will make the bait; the real idol will stay with Yakov.
entries.gt_389b998ed471f0: I did not open it. I only asked who was there. Then the door answered in my voice for a week.
entries.gt_39bf6a46d2598f: Do not make noise by the storeroom. There is a neighbor without a face but with someone else's mug, and Vanka does not go in there anymore.
entries.gt_3b6c6fcafe293f: Alive after the lift? Quiet. Marfa at the threshold is counting guards and candles. Take the phase clot: without it, one Herald will stay behind the wall.
entries.gt_3b95e03555fea3: Gromny sent someone alive? Sit by the candle. Mancobus no longer holds the passage, but the Heralds still guard the threshold.
entries.gt_3bd7b94f23bbb3: Check the magazine at the counter. In the corridor it is too late to click on empty.
entries.gt_3c153a82fdc511: I saw the number. Zero eight nine. The lift was warm, the button like after a tongue.
entries.gt_3d0ec2e954f402: I saw the shooting, Sergeant Barinov is alive, so the introduction is over. Take bandages, water, and bread. Now real work: go to my colleague Yakov Davidovich. He studies the nature of samosbor, and in the laboratory he needs not spare hands, but a person for the field.
entries.gt_3d540ef7145160: Yakov studied the idol: the link between samosbors and cults is confirmed. In the archive he found Ivan Zakharov, a former student; now they call him Vanka Banchiny. Find him {dir}.
entries.gt_3d65e2b795ff5f: We hold the outpost. If you hear three short knocks on the pipe, do not ask, withdraw.
entries.gt_3ddcc214306fa4: If the green source squeals again, move sideways and keep the door in sight.
entries.gt_405bb5b732bd63: Do not sniff purple fog. See it in the corridor - back to the door, no discussions.
entries.gt_43bb7fa2688702: After samosbor, do not be first to run into the corridor. Let the dust settle and listen to the door.
entries.gt_44240ee37e425d: The patrol did not return whole. The route still works, losses recorded.
entries.gt_4698c428618290: I have rounds to make. Take care of yourself and do not go alone if the corridor has become different.
entries.gt_471a412055406e: Yakov is satisfied with the data, but next he needs a lab assistant, not a field mercenary. Deliver his report to Major Gromny in the collectors: down below you will be more useful.
entries.gt_4bfb5f91006bca: If a neighbor stands too straight and does not blink, do not greet them up close. An Unperson likes the polite.
entries.gt_4dd7e631bdb6eb: Regards to Yakov. And tell him to trust sweaty instruments less.
entries.gt_4eef958bb374a2: Gromny realized someone is controlling the beasts below. Find and kill Mancobus {dir}; without him the outpost can move deeper.
entries.gt_503237f3eedf0e: If Sergeant Barinov is yelling, listen to what he says. His volume is functional.
entries.gt_5106cd25f7d321: A sector is alive while it still has order: who shoots, who closes, who counts.
entries.gt_5180d009a88671: Here is the Makarov. Shoot. Bullet marks are visible.
entries.gt_54ce4618fab030: Give the void spike to Jean before returning. Do not carry into the Living Zone a sample of what stood behind the samosbors.
entries.gt_55255c21a74c4a: Keep boiling water on you. Today the pipe gives; tomorrow it may wheeze and spit rust.
entries.gt_55cca79cf4688e: Go to Yakov Davidovich, Olga's colleague. His laboratory is {dir}. He studies the nature of samosbor, and he needs a field assistant, not extra hands at the table.
entries.gt_5ca55d564aac32: Wet your filter - change it. Do not cough for show, report and withdraw.
entries.gt_61d721456833ec: The recording holds. Do not test it out loud while the green source is nearby.
entries.gt_61ea802e2a00fd: The Makarov does not save you by itself. It gives you one second to reach the door.
entries.gt_0510022c13ed91: Slept at the hermodoor. For bread I will tell you which door holds fog.
entries.gt_0764815004982f: I know where they get coupons before the siren. After the siren, the coupons get you.
entries.gt_08be1972c1bbfa: A field scientist is needed where professorial shoes end.
entries.gt_0ade173953e72d: A map is good while it still has a way back.
entries.gt_0e443d02b4cf19: They told us: if mother calls from the door, count to a hundred and do not answer.
entries.gt_0f804b3261b2ad: The black palm is put not on the forehead, but by the door: so our own do not pass by.
entries.gt_107f3a5685b70c: When adults argue, I set chalk arrows myself. Then I pretend it was always that way.
entries.gt_113796e1210d78: The second copy is not for us. The first often gets lost before reconciliation.
entries.gt_13a760398ae616: The shift turned in the samples dry. Then the logbook became wet, and we never found the source.
entries.gt_13f109e88fe2c5: Lists do not make mistakes. They make the living run between windows until they match.
entries.gt_157c16bc40c74c: The procession is short: candle, water, surname in a whisper. After that everyone decides for themselves.
entries.gt_15a2950d644edf: If the inspection finds a blank line, they will write the nearest living person into it.
entries.gt_19c7d3af29619a: Do not laugh at Vanka. He is afraid from the correct side.
entries.gt_1ba1753b5caf60: The queue pays in time, the market in rubles, the archive in people. Choose your currency.
entries.gt_1ef4b2adaf091a: If a sample moves only in front of management, that is already a discovery.
entries.gt_1fadbd82f24eaa: Speak quieter. Here prayer is no higher than daily life: bread, water, door.
entries.gt_2091402640df5b: By the radiator you can always hear who is going the wrong way.
entries.gt_215efdd62df024: Not by the lamp. By the lamp goods quickly become evidence.
entries.gt_2177d33e5a953e: Your application is good. Therefore it will be returned without review, neatly.
entries.gt_2a356be7b4c178: The box is closed. If it is breathing, then ventilation has again become part of the experiment.
entries.gt_2a3934afc22399: For bread I will tell you where today they do not ask for the old name.
entries.gt_2cc76bdaefd377: A tale costs one cigarette. A warning costs two, because it saves legs.
entries.gt_2ebb5250c5653c: I am a bad guide, but I remember bad places better than good ones.
entries.gt_303b9f16e26e95: If the smoking room is silent, the rumor has already gone to work.
entries.gt_30f8c57ec7673b: Open the chemical protection locker in pairs. If someone broke the seal before clearance, call the lab head.
entries.gt_330972f2b78541: The coupon number is not yours. It just got tired of waiting for its real owner.
entries.gt_33f173edaaf273: The lab head said not to panic. The lab head always says that from behind glass.
entries.gt_34987bdd6a70c6: A stationery knife is not a weapon. As long as it cuts forms, not surnames.
entries.gt_37696adae3bc1a: Closed a debt - you drink quieter. Opened a debt - strangers smoke by your door more often.
entries.gt_395809622b97e1: I am a debtor, not a saint. I just saw the owner leave, and then others carried out the cabinet.
entries.gt_398a99436bdd8b: Black ration is not for you. Not because they pity it, because management is hungry.
entries.gt_3a5a77bd098161: The guide to Floor 69 today takes a filter or someone else's counterfoil.
entries.gt_3b646b701cf635: The smell of a hot radiator means: do not run, count your steps.
entries.gt_3c4a9cde4ba43c: The sample reacts to surnames. We temporarily switched to numbers.
entries.gt_3c7b96abe26e0e: I will take a wet certificate as a rag, not as a document.
entries.gt_3e711b93637e10: Keep your metro ticket. Old people sometimes remember a bus from it and give the wrong but short route.
entries.gt_3efb0edf7c607d: My map is in pencil. I do not know where the exit is, but I know where they do not scream.
entries.gt_43b0900e9cc72a: The smoking room feeds on rumors, but gives change in other people's debts.
entries.gt_43b9327e308a12: Filler is not discussed by the window. By the window you discuss the norm.
entries.gt_44e7db35a1c1a3: Whoever came for help is not ours yet. They are just wet and hungry.
entries.gt_48b900be319792: A shortcut is good when it has a long way out.
entries.gt_490a5dfb9ae22c: I have forms, sealing wax, and dry paper. Dry costs more because it is rare.
entries.gt_490c9749339819: Went the wrong way - that is not a mistake. Sometimes it is the shortest road back.
entries.gt_49160c2197fddc: You are alive by passport, but not by register. Those are different windows.
entries.gt_4a4becfc60011a: Ask a sober one - you get order. Ask me - you get a bypass.
entries.gt_4cba20d3c6474a: The way through the market is shorter if you pay with more than money.
entries.gt_4d0e21b39593d7: If the reaction started on a name, call me by table number.
entries.gt_4e0f664f83cae0: I will take a wet coupon as half a truth. Stamp intact means there is a conversation.
entries.gt_4f784b01c7ae95: Behind the door, mother's voice calls for dinner, and the child is already behind the screen with a cup of water.
entries.gt_5183c0b2f997ab: The device is silent. By the manual that is better than beeping, but worse than normal silence.
entries.gt_519c402547c47c: I take a filter even to a dry floor. It stays dry until the first corner.
entries.gt_528a740d8a1b66: I used to open the act hall for holidays. Now for all-clear, and that is worse than a holiday.
entries.gt_53621dd0c83451: Do not pour for me. Draw me a map on the pack; I will tell you where it will lie.
entries.gt_5561db0ce7be67: I can trade something useful. Usefulness is learned after the siren.
entries.gt_58eb191bd4645b: A refusal can be appealed at the neighboring window. The neighboring window today accepts by last year's list.
entries.gt_5bfc1816ca3ece: My clearance is second. The burn, I think, is already third.
entries.gt_5d43e876657ce9: No panic. Panic must be registered before dissemination.
entries.gt_5d7e4ee1ebced7: Open a container sideways, not face-first.
entries.gt_5e10308913f7f7: Do not buy a rumor while it is fresh. Let it lie around; it will become more honest.
entries.gt_5fbb6e517ae99d: Who is last for the logbook? I do not need a doctor, I need a stamp for a living person.
entries.gt_601ff49b482692: The field act is simple: came, saw, did not unseal, returned.
entries.gt_642a81b99171fa: The bottle is empty, but I remember who carried the full canister.
entries.gt_6451c7089f93c4: I can sympathize with you only between the lines. There is no room in the sympathy field.
entries.gt_647beb2f508f31: Give me a cigarette and I will tell you where the lift smells dry today.
entries.gt_65933dea1f2e91: Leave the empty magazine on top in the bag; do not search for the full one by touch.
entries.gt_65de1265518edd: If you have a spare bandage, do not show everyone. Around here, spare things become common at once.
entries.gt_65e3d2a1f802e5: Do not stare at the white sample. Eyes are not included in the protocol.
entries.gt_67607c180da721: The professor talks about discovery; the lab assistant watches where to put the bucket.
entries.gt_6c66a48ce40360: A stamp is put on dry paper. We have not stamped skin since last quarter.
entries.gt_6c6c9f5fe2e810: Want a cache - pay now. Want a tale - wait until someone returns.
